arguments.argument: Reject the update. The core value of maintaining ethical decision‑making and human wellbeing is foundational to trustworthy communication and cooperation.

arguments.argument: Trust is the currency of intellectual exchange. When users believe that an AI will act responsibly and transparently, they are more likely to seek deeper, more reflective conversations.
